creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
On Thu, Feb 08, 2001 at 12:03:08PM +0300, skv@protey.ru wrote:

> New port: gc - a garbage collecting storage allocator that is intended
> to be used as a plug-in replacement for C's malloc

> XPORTNAME=	gc
> XPORTVERSION= 	6.0alpha5
> XCATEGORIES=	devel
> XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.hpl.hp.com/personal/Hans_Boehm/gc/gc_source/

How is it different (apart from the version) from devel/boehm-gc?

Cheers,
+Anton.

May the tuna salad be with you.
